use_cases: Decorative animated background for hero sections
Visual wave effect for landing pages
Creative section divider with mathematical motion
Loading state or transition visual enhancement
ai_summary: An animated SVG dot grid component that renders configurable circular dots in a responsive grid, with each dot animated along a sine wave path creating flowing wave patterns. Features include customizable dot color, radius, spacing, amplitude, frequency, and animation speed. Uses ResizeObserver for responsive behavior and requestAnimationFrame for smooth 60fps rendering.
